title: Scanalyze Contract Envelope v1
description: Generic contract envelope produced by each Terraform root. Integrity is verified by recomputing the embedded digest. Freshness/authorization is verified externally by comparing digest, SSM version, producer_release, and release_manifest_digest against expected values in the deployment record.

contract_schema.description: Schema identifier for the outputs section, e.g. scanalyze.contract.network.v1

region.description: AWS region. Omitted for global/edge layers (use 'global')

producer_release.description: Release version that produced this contract

producer_module_digest.description: SHA-256 digest of the producer module source

produced_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this contract was produced

contract_digest.description: SHA-256 digest of the canonicalized outputs object. Used for integrity verification. NOT sufficient for replay/freshness — compare against deployment record.

outputs.description: Layer-specific output values. Schema determined by contract_schema field.
